title: Trident to Playing Card
description:
Turns the trident into a playing card with custom sounds :D
i think you need optifine, not 100% sure
body:
I wanted to share my **playing card trident**. Enjoy! :)

Changes the Model. AND **_VERY COOL SOUNDS_**.

No idea but i THINK it requires optifine

 

~~its not perfect visually but its alright.~~
